mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO thinking_tbl (category, title, content, password) VALUES (#{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{password})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM thinking_tbl ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id,category, title, content, password, like_count, created_at, updated_at FROM thinking_tbl WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM thinking_tbl ORDER BY like_count DESC, created_at DESC
